blockers.description: Node v14 is the default `node` on PATH; gsd-tools.cjs requires Node 20 (uses `||=` syntax) and throws SyntaxError under v14.
blockers.workaround: Run `source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20` before every gsd-tools.cjs invocation in this session/shell.

blockers.description: `gsd_run query commit ...` (the gsd-tools.cjs wrapper around git commit + pre-commit) silently failed/truncated mid pre-commit hook output (stopped right after 'Run unit tests....' with no Passed/Failed) on two attempts, even with a 540s Bash timeout.
blockers.workaround: Ran `pre-commit run --files <path>` directly first to confirm hooks actually pass (12s, all green including unit tests), then committed with a plain `git commit -m ...` heredoc instead of the gsd_run wrapper. Worked cleanly. If this recurs, prefer plain `git commit` over `gsd_run query commit` for this repo.

human_actions_pending.context: AskUserQuestion was presented but the user's reply was a context/token warning, not a selection. Re-present this question on resume, or accept a direct instruction to skip research and proceed straight to planner spawn.

decisions.decision: Inlined ### Phase 5/6/7 detail sections directly into .planning/ROADMAP.md (previously only in milestones/v1.3-ROADMAP.md)
decisions.rationale: Matches the established convention confirmed via git history (commit ce7de9e did the same for Phase 4/v1.2 while that milestone was active); gsd-tools roadmap.get-phase requires the inline section and was returning found:false / malformed_roadmap without it. This blocked multiple downstream plan-phase steps (PHASE_SECTION reads in 5.6/5.7, planner's roadmap_path read, etc.).

decisions.decision: Recommended 'Skip research' as the default answer to the step-5.1 research gate
decisions.rationale: 05-CONTEXT.md already pins exact existing-code file/line locations (sync_lco_observation_calendar.py:187), exact helper signatures, the SOARFacility(LCOFacility) subclass relationship, and all 8 implementation decisions (D-01..D-08) with rationale. This is a well-understood extension of existing Phase 4 code, not new architecture — the kind of phase discuss-phase's own context already de-risks.

context_notes: This was a clean /gsd:plan-phase 5 run with one real infra fix needed along the way (ROADMAP.md detail sections). No planner/checker agents have been spawned yet — all work so far is orchestrator-level setup and one docs-bugfix commit. The actual planning work (gsd-planner, gsd-plan-checker) has not started. Phase 5 is a backend-only Django management-command refactor (multi-proposal + multi-facility dispatch on sync_lco_observation_calendar) — no UI, no schema migrations, no AI/LLM component, so several plan-phase gates (UI gate, schema-push gate, AI-SPEC gate) are expected to no-op when reached.
